constructs.instructions_verbatim: For each letter string, participants had to indicate whether or not they knew the stimulus.
constructs.citation: Brysbaert, M., Mandera, P., McCormick, S. F., & Keuleers, E. (2019). Word prevalence norms for 62,000 English lemmas. Behavior Research Methods, 51, 1583-1603.
constructs.instructions_llm: Estimate the proportion of English speakers who know this word. Range: 0-1 (0 = almost none, 1 = almost all). Reply with one number.
